desc: Create an elevation view of a selected wall.
summary: Create an elevation view of a selected wall.
usecase: Wall elevation sheets for tile / cladding / IPS layouts.
notfor: Interior elevations requiring rooms (use the room-elevation command when built).
precondition: Active document open; wall id resolves; parent plan view exists or active view is a ViewPlan; project has an Elevation ViewFamilyType.
postcondition: One new ElevationMarker + one Elevation View added. One committed Transaction. Audit entry recorded.
logictree: 1) Resolvers: Resolver_WallId (required), Resolver_ParentViewId (optional, default=active plan view), Resolver_StandoffMm (default 1000). 2) Validate — wall id → Wall; parent view id → ViewPlan; else WireError + abort. 3) Compute marker placement via GetElevationMarkerPlacementFromWall.Compute(wall, standoffFt). If null → abort. 4) Find Elevation ViewFamilyType id; if none → WireError + abort. 5) Open Transaction 'Create elevation of wall'. 6) marker = ElevationMarker.CreateElevationMarker(doc, vftId, origin, scale). 7) view = marker.CreateElevation(doc, parentView.Id, 0). Rotate marker to face the wall if necessary via ElementTransformUtils.RotateElement. 8) Commit. 9) Bot: JSON {ok, marker_id, view_id, wall_id}. User: toast 'Elevation view '{view.Name}' created.' 10) Any exception → tracker.Fail(ex); WireFault {wall_id, parent_view_id, standoff_mm}.

preprompts: Creating elevation view of selected wall…
